name: slidev
tagline: Reference index for building Slidev-based technical presentations: Markdown syntax, animations, code highlighting, export.
verdict: Clean, compact index skill pointing to roughly 50 on-demand reference files, with clear quick-start commands and explicit verification/failure-fallback steps for dev and export. Minor gaps: no scope exclusions for the broad presentations domain, an unpinned playwright-chromium install, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: `pnpm add -D playwright-chromium` installed unpinned (no version) as an export prerequisite.
No NOT-for/exclusion guidance anywhere for this broad 'presentations' domain.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
